headline: Howmet (HWM) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company Howmet (NYSE:HWM) jumped 3.9% in the afternoon session after the de-escalation of Middle East tensions improved the long-term demand forecast for commercial aviation.
